_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of causal inference methods, including difference-in-differences, instrumental variables, regression discontinuity, propensity score matching, and their identification assumptions.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-012 (LS, cosine: 0.506), RM-K-001 (RM, cosine: 0.452).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.499). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [collateral, effects, estimation] vs WIDAI-only terms [assumptions, causal, difference, differences, discontinuity, identification] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.896, R=0.839). P exceeds R by 0.058 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.1%). "Knowledge of Collateral Effects Estimation." and "Knowledge of causal inference methods, including difference-in-differences, inst" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.562 > STS 0.499 (gap +0.062). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [collateral, effects, estimation]. WIDAI-only: [assumptions, causal, difference, differences, discontinuity, identification].

signals.detail: STS 0.499 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
